prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年兰州大学在浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约16618名→16678名→19542名→14383名→15626名，整体呈波动走势。2023年位次大幅后移至19542名，20 24年显著回升至14383名，2025年又小幅后移至15626名，近两年波动幅度约1243名。2025年基准位次为15626名；该校在浙江省招生计划2021年141人、2022年14 4人、2023年143人、2024年128人、2025年146人，2026年计划147人，较2025年仅增加1人，扩招幅度极小（约0.68%），对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 兰州 大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第38–40名（2026年排第40名），属于全国顶尖综合性大学，办学层次和学术声誉对考生有持续吸引力；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏正面（6条正面、2条负面），主要正面事件包括硕士毕业生致谢保卫部默许拾荒老人进校等温情事件，提升了学校人文形象；抖 音热度排名第53位，评价为"较热"，短视频平台曝光量中等偏上，反映报考关注度有所升温；近年无投档线断档或暴跌记录，招生稳定性较好；第五轮学科评估 中，生态学A+、草学A+、化学A-、地理学A-、生物学A-，共5个A-及以上学科。其中化学类（化学A-）、生物科学类（生物学A-）等招生专业与优势学科直接对应，对相关方向考 生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业社会热度持续高热推荐；临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业保持推荐热度；法学呈分化观望；新闻传播、生化环材等呈明显劝退。浙江省2026年普通高考考生总数约40万人，较2025年29.08万人大幅增长约37.6%，竞争显著加剧；兰州大学位于甘肃省兰州市，距浙江省较远，属于跨省就读。该校在浙江省招生计划 约140余人，占其全国招生总量比例较小，地域距离对浙江考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用，但985层次仍具吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次15626名、2026年招生计 划仅微增1人（扩幅0.68%）、浙江省考生总数大幅增长约37.6%导致竞争加剧、学校声誉偏正面且抖音热度较热等因素，预计2026年录取位次将较2025年小幅后移。预测最低录取 位次约15890名，波动区间15390–16390名。

一档（最难进）
- 法学/法学（涉外法治创新班）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约15890名，区间15390–16390名。建议位次在区间下限15390名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（法学、汉语言文学、数学基地班等）；位次在15890名附近的考生 以二档专业（计算机类、电子信息类、临床医学等）为主攻方向，兼顾就业热度与学科实力；位次在区间上限16390名附近的考生可考虑三档专业保底（化学类、生物科学、大气 科学等），其中口腔医学虽属三档但社会热度高，可作为性价比之选。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Lanzhou University in Zhejiang Province's comprehensive category were approximately 16618 → 16678 → 19542 → 14383 → 15626, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2023, the ranking significantly dropped to 19542, rebounded notably to 14383 in 2024, and slightly declined to 15626 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 1243 places in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is 15626. The university's enrollment plan in Zhejiang Province was 141 in 2021, 144 in 2022, 143 in 2023, 128 in 2024, 146 in 2025, and 147 in 2026, an increase of only 1 student compared to 2025, with a minimal expansion rate (about 0.68%), having limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been stable at 38–40 in recent years (40th in 2026), making it a top-tier comprehensive university in China. Its institutional level and academic reputation continue to attract students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly positive (6 positive, 2 negative). Major positive events include a master's graduate thanking the security department for tacitly allowing a waste collector to enter the campus, enhancing the university's humanistic image. Its Douyin popularity ranks 53rd, rated as "relatively hot," indicating moderate to high exposure on short video platforms and rising attention from applicants. There have been no records of admission cutoff line drops or crashes in recent years, showing stable enrollment. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Ecology (A+), Grassland Science (A+), Chemistry (A-), Geography (A-), and Biology (A-) were among the top disciplines. Among these, Chemistry (A-) and Biological Sciences (A-) directly correspond to enrollment majors, strongly attracting students in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation remain highly popular. Medical majors like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology maintain recommendation heat. Law shows divergence and wait-and-see attitude. Journalism and Communication, as well as Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials, show clear discouragement. In 2026, the total number of general college entrance examination candidates in Zhejiang Province is about 400,000, a significant increase of about 37.6% compared to 290,800 in 2025, intensifying competition. Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou City, Gansu Province, far from Zhejiang Province, requiring cross-province study. Its enrollment plan in Zhejiang Province is about 140 students, a small proportion of its total national enrollment. The geographical distance somewhat inhibits the willingness of Zhejiang candidates to apply, but the 985 level still holds appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 15626, the 2026 enrollment plan increase of only 1 student (expansion rate 0.68%), the significant increase of about 37.6% in the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province leading to intensified competition, the slightly positive reputation and relatively hot Douyin popularity, it is expected that the 2026 admission ranking will slightly decline compared to 2025. The predicted minimum admission ranking is about 15890, with a fluctuation range of 15390–16390.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Law / Law (Foreign-Related Rule of Law Innovation Class)
- Chinese Language and Literature
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Base Class)
- History (including History Base Class)
- Economics (Base Class) / Economics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Computer Science (including Base Class)
- Electronic Information (including Base Class)
- Clinical Medicine
- Journalism and Communication
- Business Administration (AI and Smart Management Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemistry (including Base Class)
- Biological Sciences (including Base Class)
- Materials
- Atmospheric Sciences (including Base Class)
- Stomatology
- Theoretical and Applied Mechanics (Base Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 15890, range 15390–16390. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 15390 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Mathematics Base Class, etc.). Candidates near 15890 should target Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Clinical Medicine, etc.) as the main direction, balancing employment popularity and academic strength. Candidates near the upper limit of 16390 can consider Tier 3 majors as safety options (Chemistry, Biological Sciences, Atmospheric Sciences, etc.), among which Stomatology, though in Tier 3, has high social popularity and can be a cost-effective choice.
